element_introduction_order.mastery_context: baseline weapon system with red-blue-yellow charging mechanics
alternative weapon set with different strategic properties
third distinct force variant with unique enhancements
charging to full beam strength for massive penetrating damage
rapid-fire mode with explosion damage and overheating cooldown penalty
orbit ship when collected; gain enhanced fire behavior in Hyper mode

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: escalating difficulty with high-intensity boss sequences; Hyper mode introduces risk-reward tension through temporary weapon loss during cooldown

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to three Force variants and standard wave cannon; baseline enemy encounters
difficulty_curve.late_game: escalated enemy density and complex boss attack patterns noted as 'rather high difficulty'
notable_spikes: Hyper Wave Cannon mode: high damage but forces extended cooldown vulnerability

notable_level_patterns.description: Player chooses from three distinct force types (Round/Standard, Shadow, Cyclone) before each stage, creating branching difficulty and strategy pathways
Hyper Wave Cannon offers rapid-fire explosive damage but incurs overheating penalty with inactive weapon downtime, forcing tactical mode-switching decisions
Reviewers specifically noted 'huge levels' with extended horizontal scrolling and multiple combat zones
